name: BTL1 Review
verdict: Highly recommend for SOC L1 aspirants
summary: The 24-hour practical exam is the standout. You're handed a real attack scenario and have to investigate it end-to-end — phishing, malware, lateral movement, exfil — and write a full IR report.

name: AZ-500 Review
verdict: Best cloud-sec cert for M365 admins
summary: Passed first try with John Savill's videos plus hands-on tenant work. The exam scenarios mirror real client problems — Conditional Access, PIM, Defender for Cloud, and Sentinel.

name: CCDL2 Review
summary: Live IR scenarios are unforgiving but rewarding. Memory forensics with Volatility, log correlation across multiple sources, and threat hunting all stretched my skills.

name: SAL1 Review
verdict: Solid intro to SOC analyst work
summary: Great structured path covering SIEM analysis, phishing triage, and IR fundamentals. Best paired with hands-on lab time on Splunk or Sentinel afterward.

name: CompTIA Security+ Review
summary: Broad but shallow. It's the cert that opens doors more than it teaches deep skills, but the breadth of coverage is genuinely useful for context.
